summarySection.summary: Proficient in developing AI-driven applications with a focus on backend services and cloud technologies. Experienced in Python and FastAPI, with a strong foundation in API development and data processing. Committed to creating scalable solutions that enhance user interactions and streamline workflows.

experience.description:
• Developed and maintained backend services and REST APIs using Python and Django, ensuring secure workflows for financial compliance. 
• Collaborated with senior engineers to design scalable service architectures and data models, enhancing system performance. 
• Created interactive React dashboards that integrated with Django APIs, providing real-time visibility into operational metrics and backend processes. 
• Optimized data-processing pipelines in Python and PostgreSQL, achieving a ~40% reduction in latency and improving overall system scalability.

projects.description:
• Engineered an AI-powered resume builder that automates the parsing of PDF/DOCX files into structured data, enhancing user experience. 
• Developed backend services for parsing and authentication using FastAPI and PostgreSQL, streamlining data workflows. 
• Implemented a real-time editing interface in React, allowing users to customize resumes seamlessly. 
• Integrated OpenAI API for intelligent content generation, facilitating automated resume editing and extraction.

• Built a comprehensive personal finance application that automates account aggregation and transaction tracking, providing users with insightful financial analytics. 
• Designed FastAPI services and PostgreSQL schemas for Plaid integrations, ensuring reliable transaction processing. 
• Developed responsive React dashboards for user account management and transaction reviews, enhancing user engagement. 
• Implemented secure data handling protocols (OAuth/JWT) to protect user financial information.

warnings: Selection guard kept high-fit project(s) for this JD: SecureScape – Smart Security System (python), ShelfVision - Dense Shelf Object Detection (python), SentimentTrader -  Real-Time Stock Sentiment Pipeline (python, engineering), Tizirsso Racing – Portfolio & Sponsorship Website (javascript).

experience.description:
• Developed backend services and REST APIs in Python/Django to support secure workflows for financial and compliance teams.
• Collaborated with senior engineers on system design and architecture, contributing to scalable service patterns and data modeling.
• Created React dashboards integrated with Django APIs, improving visibility into operational metrics and backend data workflows.
• Optimized Python data-processing pipelines and PostgreSQL queries, achieving a ~40% reduction in latency.
